depth_pass: A2 Targeted Depth Block 4 — Thin-Family Thickening

obligations.obligation: Must lease/acquire location before signing FLA; written approval required
Must attend and complete Initial Training; management employees may be required
obligations.restriction: Cannot operate without completing training to satisfaction

obligations.obligation: Pay initial fee, tiered royalty, POM costs, transfer fee
Operate in compliance with Manual; Manual may be modified at any time
obligations.restriction: Must comply with modifications at franchisee expense
Either through Franchise Insurance Program or A-VII rated carrier

obligations.obligation: All advertising requires prior written approval
obligations.restriction: No unsolicited email; no unapproved promotional materials

obligations.obligation: Submit to inspections and audits of books, records, operations
obligations.restriction: Refusal to allow inspection is incurable default

obligations.obligation: All franchise business property serves as collateral for both loans
obligations.restriction: Cannot pledge Client Data or Confidential Information to third-party lenders

obligations.obligation: Default on any loan or FLA triggers default on all
obligations.trigger: Any breach of Credit Documents or FLA

obligations.obligation: Associates (spouses, officers, directors, shareholders, partners, members, trustees) may be required as co-borrowers
Cannot operate internet website, sell online, or solicit online without written authorization
If franchisee closes/abandons a location, franchisor may operate it and amend territory
obligations.restriction: Must assign all rights in lease and phone numbers for abandoned location

obligations.obligation: Must get written permission and sign FLA amendment to operate in retail stores, military bases, or government facilities

rights.right: May serve clients outside territory from approved locations within territory
May advertise in media originating in territory that extends beyond territory

obligations.obligation: Dedicate full-time best efforts during Tax Season and Preseason
Must have qualified employees and staff to assist in operating the business
Must provide sufficient supervision to ensure accurate tax preparation and FLA/law compliance
May only offer/sell expressly approved services and products
obligations.restriction: Must discontinue any product franchisor disapproves in writing

obligations.obligation: Franchisor may (but currently does not) specify min/max/other prices
Must open initial Approved Location within 14 days of Effective Date

items_thickened.status: No public figures used. Franchisee advertising with public figures requires written approval. No thickening needed — family is complete.
